channel.title: KingZen Sofa - Latest North American Sofa Styles
channel.description: Chinese sofa factory offering newest 2026 North American sofa styles. Factory direct, MOQ 1 piece, 35-45 days delivery to US & Canada.

item.title: 2026 Latest Modular Sectional Sofas Now Available
item.description: Newest 2026 North American modular sofa styles including Cloud Sectional, Aurora U-Shape, and Nova Compact. Factory direct, fully customizable, MOQ 1 piece.

item.title: Wholesale Custom Sofas - 35-45 Days to USA & Canada
item.description: KingZen Sofa offers factory direct custom sofas with 25D high-density sponge. Shipping to all major US and Canada ports. Email for quote.
